data.body:
Goal:
Correct the managed skill guidance so it accurately distinguishes normal agent claim leases from MCP session leases. Normal CLI claim leases are spent by `kno next` or rollback, while MCP session leases may be returned to `lease_ready` for reuse by that session. Agents should still be told to acquire a fresh normal claim lease after advancing a knot, but the docs must not imply that every lease is destroyed in every path.

Verification:
1. Run `cargo test managed_skills`; expect all managed skill tests to pass, including a regression for the corrected lease lifecycle wording.
2. Run `make sanity`; expect formatting, lint, tests, and coverage to pass.
3. Inspect the updated managed skills and confirm the wording names both normal claim leases and MCP session leases without changing runtime behavior.

Constraints:
Keep the scope to managed skill templates and tests unless the audit reveals a concrete code/doc mismatch. Do not lower `.ci/coverage-threshold.txt`. Do not use the forbidden yeet/GitHub PR flow.
data.title: Correct lease lifecycle guidance
